text: Being here, surrounded by glass, clean lines, and bold, abstract colors, I feel suspended between realities. The space is orderly and futuristic, almost clinical, but the playful colors of the gallery wall draw out an undercurrent of curiosity. I sense a dialogue between human creativity and the logic of machines, making me reflect on how we seek understanding in unfamiliar environments. It feels both isolating and inviting, as if urging me to question the boundaries between observer and participant.
